title: Springerle
ingredients: Scant 5 cups sifted flour (about 4 ¾ cups)
instructions: Gradually add powdered sugar and beat at medium high speed for 20 minutes.
Add flour and anise oil, then knead on lightly floured board until smooth.
Roll out dough ¼ inch thick.
Press well-floured wooden springerle molds into dough and cut into squares.
Place cookies on parchment lined baking sheets on top of sprinkled anise seeds.
Let dry on baking sheets for at least 12 hours.
Bake at 275 degrees for 25-30 minutes, keeping oven door closed.
Remove from oven and cool on racks.
notes: Ammonium carbonate should be special ordered (traditionally bought at pharmacies). Can substitute with 1 ½ tsp baking powder, but cookies will not be as good.
Anise oil should be special ordered
Do not open oven door during baking
Hide from Mason if you leave the house
